extraction_reasoning: The litigation table separates matters filed by and against each category: I counted only the Against rows—criminal proceedings of 0 against the Company, 1 against Directors, 1 against Promoters, 0 against Subsidiaries and 3 against Group Companies, while excluding all By rows; statutory/regulatory proceedings are nil in all rows, and tax proceedings against the Company and Subsidiaries are 3 and 1 respectively, excluding promoter/director tax matters. For the aggregate amount against the Company and Subsidiaries, I used the quantified Against Company amount of ₹1,000.53 lakhs plus Against Subsidiaries amount of ₹0.002 lakhs; the table has no stated group total, and unquantified By matters were excluded. The contingent-liabilities figure is the stated Total of ₹3,256.20 lakhs as at March 31, 2025, rather than a re-sum. Concentration percentages disclosed are for top projects, not top customers, so no company-wide top-five or top-ten customer percentage is extracted; the project percentages use total revenue for Fiscal 2025. The source tables use ₹ in lakhs; amounts were converted to crore by dividing by 100 (₹1,000.532 lakhs = ₹10.00532 crore and ₹3,256.20 lakhs = ₹32.562 crore).
